summary: Keep Python Quality required check names mergeable for docs-only runtime-control PRs.
rationale: Graphite treats required Python Quality child jobs as failed when docs-only PRs skip them at the job level. This PR keeps the protected job names stable by moving scope skips into successful no-op steps while preserving full Python execution for Python and workflow changes.
deletion_targets: job-level required-check skips that block Graphite stack merge for docs-only PRs
verification: uv run ruff check tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py
uv run ty check tools/check_pr_governance.py tests/test_pr_governance.py

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import yaml
with Path('.github/workflows/python-quality.yml').open(encoding='utf-8') as fh:
    yaml.safe_load(fh)
print('yaml ok')
PY
risks: Required check names must stay stable while docs-only PRs avoid expensive Python jobs.
Workflow-file changes must still force full Python Quality execution.
No-op skip steps must not mask real Python, tests, or workflow changes.
